title: Monologue
description: The story is a façade. The energy is real. Fresh from the vibrant contemporary scene of Tehran, "MONOLOGUE!" makes its UK debut after a highly successful run at the iconic Molavi Hall. On the surface, it begins as a crime narrative told across six episodic fragments. But don’t be fooled. This is not traditional storytelling; it is a post-modern rebellion against structure. Starring Arshia Etemadi as "The Actor," the performance blurs the terrifyingly thin line between a scripted character and a living human being on stage. Clidook Group invites you to witness a raw experiment where no two nights are ever the same. Performed in Persian with English Surtitles—until the improvisation breaks the rules, shifting into English and universal physical language.

reviews.excerpt: The Bite Size Monologues present nine small but ever enticing insights into the warped and intriguing minds of some sad souls. Seemingly unrelated, these ten minute pieces lure the audience into laughing at some of life’s twisted yet unfortunate characters.
